description: Extract a bare-earth terrain model from the survey dataset C:\Users\Docker\Documents\denver_site_unclassified.csv by removing building roof points identified as anomalous flat clusters. Generate a Triangulated Irregular Network (TIN / MDT) from the resulting ground points. Export the cleaned ground points to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bare_earth_points.csv and save the TopoCal project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bare_earth_model.top.
